name: toolbelt
description: Connect Claude to your governed Toolbelt org and route work to its agents. Claude is the front door; Toolbelt is the brain.

toolbelt_workspace_id.title: Hub workspace (assistant) ID
toolbelt_workspace_id.description: Your Toolbelt hub workspace (assistant) ID — the agent whose endpoint lists your org roster and routes work.

toolbelt_api_key.title: Toolbelt API key
toolbelt_api_key.description: Your Toolbelt API key. Stored in your OS keychain (sensitive); never written to the repo and never sent in a URL.
